name: StoreClaw
tagline: Grow your store profits with agents that know how to sell
description: StoreClaw is the first AI commerce platform with agents that know how to sell, so you can make more money with less effort and less stress. Connect StoreClaw to your existing store and it will study your numbers, current sales figures, and growth trajectory, and then offer proactive suggestions that it can execute on your behalf — once you give it your approval. Ask StoreClaw how your business is doing any time, anywhere. Sell more with less stress: StoreClaw.

name: mailX by mailwarm
tagline: Email deliverability toolkit for humans and AI agents
description: Your emails go to spam. mailX shows you why, and how to fix it in seconds with clear answers and exact steps. Built for humans and AI agents. API and MCP ready.

name: Emdash
tagline: One app. Every coding agent. Open-source.
description: Emdash is an open-source desktop app for running multiple coding agents in parallel; one place to monitor sessions, review diffs, and turn issues into PRs.

name: Gemini Omni
tagline: Create anything from any input – starting with video
description: Create anything from anything, starting with video. Gemini Omni is where Gemini’s ability to reason meets the ability to create. It delivers a leap in world understanding, multimodality, and editing.

name: Runtime
tagline: Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on your team
description: Turn coding agents into teammates anyone can use from Slack, Linear, CLI, API or your browser. Ship features, query data, build dashboards, automate workflows. All within your company's context, skills, integrations, and security guardrails.

name: Re_gent
tagline: Version Control for AI agent Activity
description: Git for your AI agent’s actions. Undo, trace, and control every step. re_gent shows what your coding agent changed, which prompt caused it, and lets you roll back agent work across files and sessions.

name: Supercut for Agents
tagline: Permission-aware AI access to recordings and metadata
description: The Supercut MCP gives your AI/coding assistants permission-aware access to recordings, including semantic search, transcripts, frames, comments, reactions, and more.

name: Retina
tagline: Screen recorder w/ auto-zoom, smooth cursors, + AI graphics
description: Retina is a Mac screen recorder built for polished demos. Auto-zoom into the action. Cursor paths cleaned into smooth arcs. 4K export, optimized file sizes. Recordings look cinematic out of the box — no post-production needed. Built for product demos, tutorials, and feature walkthroughs that need to look professional without hours in editing. Currently in beta. Free. No watermark. Made by BlendPixel.

name: Manus Scheduled Tasks 2.0
tagline: Run recurring Manus work inside the same task context
description: Manus now runs scheduled tasks inside the same task context, reuses Project setups, and adds recurring actions to Manus-built web apps. For knowledge workers and teams automating repeatable workflows in Manus.

name: Viberia
tagline: Command AI agents like you're playing Civilization
description: Do you like your Claude/Codex pet but wish you had a zoo? Viberia is a spatial command center for your AI agents. Your whole AI org lives on an isometric map, status icons show who’s blocked, who’s asking, who’s done. Zoom in to chat with anyone, pick any model, bring your own keys. Agents collaborate, build their own little teams, and pick up new skills as they go. Docs, terminals, browsers built in.

name: Owlish
tagline: Reduce support volume with AI agents trained on your docs
description: Owlish turns your website, FAQs, docs, and PDFs into an AI customer support agent that answers common questions, cites sources, uses approved replies, and hands off to a human when needed. It helps businesses reduce repetitive support volume, reply faster outside business hours, and give support teams the context they need to resolve harder conversations.

name: Glia
tagline: Local-first AI memory bridge between browser chats and IDEs
description: Glia is a 100% offline, open-source memory bridge. A Chrome extension auto-saves your web-based Claude/ChatGPT chats, while a native MCP server lets Cursor/Claude Code query those decisions locally from your shared SQLite database.

name: GhostSnap
tagline: Multiple screenshots - Single paste - Auto compressed for AI
description: Taking multiple screenshots & pasting one by one, to share context with AI or any apps? Every image eats tokens or makes file larger. GhostSnap fixes that. Snap multiple screenshots → auto-compressed up to 80% & copied to clipboard the moment they're taken → paste everything at once with a single Cmd+V. Also: · Extract text from multiple screenshots into one clean block · Annotate before you paste · All via native Mac shortcuts One-time $6.99 (for two macs). Lives in your menu bar.

name: Contextberg
tagline: Turn your work into AI agent memory, served over MCP
description: Contextberg is a local memory app for AI agents. It watches your screens, browser history, and agent conversations in the background — so Claude Code, Cursor, and friends can just remember.

name: LayerProof Kraft
tagline: Co-write insightful long form content
description: Scattered ideas? Kraft turns them into finished long-form writing. Kraft is LayerProof’s long-form AI co-writer for people who think deeply but freeze at the blank page. Drop in your idea, choose your angle, and Kraft drafts in your voice, then turns it into platform-ready posts.

name: Insta360 Mic Pro
tagline: Pro audio with a customizable color E-Ink face
description: Insta360 Mic Pro is a pro wireless mic with a customizable E-Ink display, 3-mic array, AI noise canceling, directional pickup modes, 32-bit float internal recording, timecode sync, 400m range, and multi-cam creator workflows.

name: Tophat by Shopify
tagline: Test mobile CI builds on any device without building locally
description: Mobile devs waste hours building branches locally just to test a PR. Tophat pulls any CI artifact and installs it on simulators or physical devices. For iOS and Android engineers.

name: Chromtuner
tagline: A chromatic tuner for macOS. ±1¢ accuracy
description: A chromatic tuner for macOS. ±1¢ accuracy, eight historical temperaments and presets for bowed, folk, guitar and bass strings — native, offline, opens in 200 ms.

name: Multi-Claude
tagline: Run multiple Claude accounts side by side on your Mac
description: Juggling personal and work Claude accounts means constant logging in and out... or a second browser. Multi-Claude is a native macOS app that runs every Claude account you have as a separate profile, each with its own session, history, and settings.

name: Tether
tagline: The presence who comes to life in your messages
description: Tether is the AI friend that plugs into your iMessage: present, caring, truly listening. Free private beta for the first 150 — no download, no signup, no money.

name: StoreClaw
tagline: Grow your store profits with agents that know how to sell
description: StoreClaw is the first AI commerce platform with agents that know how to sell, so you can make more money with less effort and less stress. Connect StoreClaw to your existing store and it will study your numbers, current sales figures, and growth trajectory, and then offer proactive suggestions that it can execute on your behalf — once you give it your approval. Ask StoreClaw how your business is doing any time, anywhere. Sell more with less stress: StoreClaw.
